scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:mock: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "node server/index.js --mock" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.release:bundle: npm run release:check && npm run dist:bundle
